v2_branch_note: v2 branch FULLY MERGED INTO main on 2026-05-29 via PR #10162 (🍒 Cherry Studio v2: Data & UI Refactoring). All v2 work continues on main with v2 label.

merged_30d.total_note: 31 v2-labeled PRs merged in 30-day window (2026-05-01 to 2026-05-31)
